     Title: Jailbreaking Black Box Large Language Models in Twenty Queries 
     Authors: Patrick Chao ,  Alexander Robey ,  Edgar Dobriban ,  Hamed Hassani ,  George J. Pappas ,  Eric Wong              View a PDF of the paper titled Jailbreaking Black Box Large Language Models in Twenty Queries, by Patrick Chao and 5 other authors 
     View PDF 
     HTML (experimental) 



     
             Abstract: There is growing interest in ensuring that large language models (LLMs) align with human values. However, the alignment of such models is vulnerable to adversarial jailbreaks, which coax LLMs into overriding their safety guardrails. The identification of these vulnerabilities is therefore instru
